note: Stage-1 ROUND 3 (text, Qwen3-1.7B): the chunk-8192 online round. Static probe showed chunk 8192 is best for context, and 8192 requires the decoupled --max-seq-len (training backward is O(msl^2); msl=8192 would OOM on 40GB, msl<=4096 is proven from round 1). Memory contract on 40GB: encode batch <= [2, 8192] -> train_interval in {1,2} and batch_chunks=2; training backward <= [1, 4096]. Sweeps the two knobs that matter at this scale: train_interval (1 = train after EVERY chunk, the most-online schedule; fewer chunks at 8192 make updates scarcer, so ti=1 compensates) x max_seq_len (2048 vs 4096 training window). Adaptation config = round-1 winner (lr 3e-4, r 32, ep 3, attn-only) — UPDATE from round-2 text results when they land (lr/epochs/r/MLP), then re-gen. Compare the winner's online_rate against round-2's chunk-4096 winner: whichever absolute bpc is lower decides the final chunk_size.
